creator: harrycoin@quietfountain.com
text:
If openldap24-sasl-client is installed, nss-pam-ldapd does, but shouldn't, complain and then need/try to install openldap24-client.

Fix: 

Probably should just enable sasl in nss-pam-ldapd.  Or add nss-pam-ldapd-sasl, to use openldap24-sasl-client.
How-To-Repeat: add openldap24-sasl-client, add nss-pam-ldapd, note complaints.
